offer: For construction contractors managing 5-15 projects simultaneously, inefficient scheduling causes project delays. We automate equipment maintenance tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inefficient scheduling and tracking of equipment maintenance leading to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflow challenges
DM outreach to contractors with a demo video
Forums where contractors share project management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for maintenance logs and simple dashboard for tracking maintenance history on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
